# DigitalCoa.ch - Executive AI Operating Systems

## High-Level Summary
DigitalCoa.ch is a Geneva-based strategic advisory firm helping executives, boards, and Swiss SMBs navigate AI governance and decision architecture. Founded by Sergio Brotons.

## Core Services
- Executive Decision Diagnostic (2-5 days): Analysis of decision flows and friction.
- Decision & Governance Architecture (6-12 weeks): Strategic frameworks for leadership teams.
- Personal Decision Infrastructure: Coaching for senior professionals.

## Key Principles
- Governance-first
- Human-led
- Swiss precision
- Practical implementation over theoretical hype

## Contact
https://digitalcoa.ch/en/contact
sergio@digitalcoa.ch
